## What & why

Describe the change and the motivation behind it.

## How verified

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` is clean
- [ ] Exercised the demo / affected flow manually

## Checklist

- [ ] Focused, single-purpose change
- [ ] No secrets, wallet seeds, `.env` files, or large binaries committed
- [ ] README / docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] I agree my contribution is licensed under Apache-2.0
